name: eventhub-backend
description: AI skill for the EventHub core backend (core-api Laravel 11).

commands.test: docker compose exec core-api php artisan test
commands.migrate: docker compose exec core-api php artisan migrate
commands.seed: docker compose exec core-api php artisan db:seed
commands.route:list: docker compose exec core-api php artisan route:list
commands.tinker: docker compose exec core-api php artisan tinker

notes: Core API uses Laravel 11 with PHP 8.2+.
Layered architecture: Controller -> Service -> Repository -> Model.
Business logic belongs in core-api/app/Services, NOT in controllers.
Data access is abstracted through Repositories (app/Repositories/) bound to Contracts (app/Repositories/Contracts/).
All monetary values MUST be stored as integer cents (DECIMAL columns exist but should be migrated to unsignedBigInteger).
All API responses must follow {success: bool, data: mixed, message: string} format.
Financial operations require idempotency and audit trails via financial_event_logs table.
Redis distributed locking used for concurrent ticket purchases (Cache::lock).
Role-based access via RequireRole middleware (admin, vendor, attendee).
Inter-service authentication via VerifySharedSecret middleware on payment webhook routes.
5 background commands: holds:cleanup, sales:generate-reports, payouts:process-batches, reminders:send-events, waitlist:process.
Soft deletes on events and ticket_types; hard deletes on ticket_reservations.
